1100100101010100 1001110110000011 1 -> sum: 0110011011011000, cout: 1
1000000011000001 0001011001010000 0 -> sum: 1001011100010001, cout: 0
0110010011111001 0011101100110000 0 -> sum: 1010000000101001, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
